name: Thaicom Public Company Limited
summary: Thaicom Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides transponder services for domestic and international communications. The company operates through three segments: Satellite and Related Services, Internet and Media Services, and Telephone Business Abroad. It also offers broadband content, internet data center, Internet, satellite uplink-downlink, broadcasting television, telecommunications, telephone network, and mobile content services. In addition, the company sells user terminal iPSTAR, as well as direct television equipment. Further, it is involved in the provision of technical support services in relation to satellite business, as well as engineering and development services on communication technology and electronics; and system integration consultancy services for broadband networks. The company has operations in Thailand, Singapore, Lao PDR, Australia, New Zealand, Mauritius, the British Virgin Islands, Japan, and India. Thaicom Public Company Limited was founded in 1991 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
